hypothesis: An ensemble formation-energy predictor trained on a combined dataset of relaxed DFT structures, their corresponding unrelaxed/perturbed variants, and diffusion-model-generated structures will predict energy-above-hull with mean absolute error ≤ 0.08 eV/atom and yield energy-distribution EMD scores whose Pearson correlation (absolute value) with DFT-based SUN scores (stability within 0.1 eV/atom) is ≥ 0.9 on both MP- and OQMD-derived test sets.
